name: Thespian
ability: Each night, choose if evil abilities choose you instead until dusk.
flavor: Show yourself to the masses, for you are the world's entertainment and the world is your audience. Give it your all, do not slow down, and take a deep breath. You were always meant to be here. (v1.1)
firstNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.
otherNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.

jinxes.reason: If the Thespian is performing while the Llech chooses their host, the Thespian is not chosen instead.

name: Observer
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn how many reminder tokens are on them.
flavor: Alright, you, a little to the left, and you, shoulders back. Okay, now everyone, say cheese! (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.

name: Jester
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to tell a joke in private: if they laughed, a player becomes sober, healthy & gets true info.
otherNightReminder: If the Jester made you laugh, a player immediately became sober & healthy. If you haven't done this yet, do so now. :reminder: Wake them, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Jester tokens.

name: Roadie
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to guess a song in private: if correct, you learn true info, but if wrong, you learn false info.

name: Cheerleader
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: until dusk, their ability works twice.
firstNightReminder: The Cheerleader might choose a player. If necessary, wake the chosen player, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Cheerleader token. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Cheerleader might choose a player. If necessary, wake the chosen player, show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & the Cheerleader token. :reminder:

name: Pitied
ability: If you are the last living good player, good wins.
flavor: If things are going to continue to suck THIS badly, God eventually will look down on me and spare me some grace eventually, right...? (v1.1)

name: Lover
ability: If a player agrees, they are bound to you. You wake when they wake. If you die, they die, & vice versa.
flavor: Lover, lover, for whom do you call? For a man neither wide nor tall? If he asks for your hand, give him a cloth. If he asks for your light, give him a moth. If he asks for your heart, tell him off. (v1.0)

name: Baton Twirler
ability: The 1st time are killed or executed by an evil player, you live but register as dead. If you are then executed, your team wins. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: I spin then you spin then I spin then you- aw come on, you dropped it! You ruined it! You ruined everything! (v1.3)

name: Identical Triplet
ability: You think you are an in-play Townsfolk character, but you are not. [+1 Identical Triplet. You & your Identical Triplet think you are the same character. -1 Outsider]

name: Bookkeeper
ability: You can't speak the group's primary language, or might be executed.

name: Crimson Sister
ability: The 1st time a Minion dies, they live but register as dead. The 1st time you die, you don't.
flavor: Nurture always wins over nature. No one chooses where they come from, they only choose who they become. I will do anything to sever myself from my heritage. (v1.3)

name: Overseer
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You cannot die. If you are the only evil player alive, good wins.
flavor: make the flavor text a reference to young & dumb by cigarettes after sex (v1.0)

name: Spin Doctor
ability: Each night, choose a player & 9 words: they must speak using only these words tomorrow, or might be executed.

name: Adultery
ability: If a 50% majority publicly accuses a player of adultery, they cannot nominate nor vote.

name: Snafu
ability: If the Storyteller makes a mistake, all players know this & the black sliver gets bigger.
flavor: Don't worry about it. Don't worry about it! You really don't need to worry about it. (v1.0)
